name: LLaMA
tagline: First-generation LLaMA dense models (roughly 7B, 13B, 33B and 65B), released as research-only weights.
metaDescription: LLaMA (Meta), released 2023-02-24 — part of the Llama 1 line. First-generation LLaMA dense models (roughly 7B, 13B, 33B and 65B), released as research-only wei…
overview: LLaMA is a large language model from Meta, part of the Llama 1 line. Released 2023-02-24. The original LLaMA research models that started the family.
What's notable in this version: First-generation LLaMA dense models (roughly 7B, 13B, 33B and 65B), released as research-only weights.
